title: No. of FTE direct local employees hired or retained for contract duration
definition: The FTE number of people directly employed on the contract residing in the local area with employment contract duration of at least one year (or contract duration if shorter). Only direct employees - supply chain captured through NT1c.
target_requirements: Summarise your strategy for directly employing your target number of local people on this contract. E.g. advertise in local newspapers, cooperate with local job centres - specify which ones and how.
evidence_required: For each qualifying employee specify: 1) duration of employment; 2) employment status (full/part time); 3) FTE; 4) first half of home postcode. E.g. Employee 1: 6 months; full-time; 0.5 FTE; SE1. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: FTE of 1.0 = one person full time for 12 months. Two people full time for 6 months = 1.0 FTE. Full time = at least 35 hours/week.

title: No. of FTE local employees hired or retained in your supply chain
definition: FTE number of people employed on the contract by the supply chain residing in the local area with contract duration of at least one year (or contract duration if shorter).
target_requirements: Summarise existing or planned requirements for supply chain on local employment and their strategy for employing target number of local people.
evidence_required: For each qualifying employee: 1) duration; 2) status; 3) FTE; 4) first half of postcode. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: FTE of 1.0 = one person full time for 12 months. Full time = at least 35 hours/week.

title: No. of FTE employees hired who are NEET (Not in Employment, Education, or Training)
definition: 16-24 yr old employees taken on who had not been in NEET before start of employment. Applies to direct employees only, first year of employment only. Additional to NT1.
target_requirements: Summarise strategy for employing NEET people. Specify organisations/job centres you will partner with.
evidence_required: For each: 1) duration; 2) status; 3) FTE; 4) whether first employment after NEET. Provide partner organisation details. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: FTE of 1.0 = full time for 12 months. Full time = 35+ hours/week.

title: No. of expert staff hours supporting curriculum (guest lectures, workshops, case studies)
definition: Staff expert hours for preparation and delivery of curriculum activities including guest lectures, practical workshops, case studies, research project topics.
target_requirements: Summarise workplan for expert staff time on curriculum activities. Breakdown hours per visit (preparation vs delivery). E.g. 10 staff x 3 hours = 30 hours.
evidence_required: Name of university/consortia visited, breakdown of expert hours per visit (prep + delivery). Describe visits and activities. Provide confirmation from university. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: E.g. 10 staff x 3 hours each = 30 total hours.

title: No. of weeks of training opportunities (BTEC, City & Guilds, NVQ, HNC - Level 2,3,4+)
definition: Weeks of vocational training on contract, supported to completion. Direct employees only, not staff upskilling (use NT80/NT81). Only qualifications supported to completion count.
target_requirements: Specify number of people in training, weeks per person. Details of training provider, type, level, resulting qualification. Weeks by qualification level.
evidence_required: Number of people, weeks per person, training provider details, type, level, qualification. GDPR compliant. Weeks by qualification level.
unit_guidance: Record weeks of vocational training even if supported beyond contract duration, as long as supported to completion.

title: No. of weeks of apprenticeships or T-Levels (Level 2,3,4) on contract
definition: Weeks of apprenticeships on contract, supported to completion. Direct employees only. If part-financed through apprenticeship levy, attribution must be applied.
target_requirements: Strategy for providing apprenticeship weeks. Details of training provider, type, level, qualifications. Note apprenticeship levy attribution if applicable.
evidence_required: Number of people, weeks per person, training provider, type, level, qualification. Apprenticeship levy attribution if applicable. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: Record weeks of apprenticeship training even if supported beyond contract duration.

title: No. of weeks of employee upskilling (BTEC, City & Guilds, NVQ, HNC, RQF - Level 2,3,4+)
definition: Weeks of upskilling vocational training as part of comprehensive upskilling programmes. Must be supported to completion.
target_requirements: Strategy for upskilling training, details of provider, type, level, qualifications. How you will support completion.
evidence_required: Number of people, weeks per person, provider, type, level, qualification. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: Total weeks of upskilling vocational training. Only training as part of comprehensive upskilling programmes.

title: Meaningful work placements paying Minimum/National Living Wage - 6+ weeks (internships)
definition: Cumulative weeks of work placements (each 6+ weeks). Must pay at least minimum/national living wage. Temporary work experience for gaining industry insight.
target_requirements: Strategy for providing paid work placements. Specify type, pay type (minimum/living/higher wage), industry experience. Name partner organisations/schools/universities.
evidence_required: Number of people, duration in weeks, type (including pay type), industry experience gained. Partner organisations. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: Total weeks on contract (each placement must be at least 6 weeks).

title: Total amount (GBP) spent with VCSEs in supply chain
definition: Amount spent on VCSE suppliers for the contract. Social Enterprise UK tool for identification. This is the additional social value from spending with a VCSE.
target_requirements: Breakdown of estimated spend with VCSEs, names (or range of names), type of goods/services from each.
evidence_required: Breakdown of spend with VCSEs, names, type of goods/services from each.
unit_guidance: GBP spent with VCSEs in supply chain. Do not need to be local VCSEs.

title: Total amount (GBP) spent in local supply chain
definition: Cumulative spend with suppliers based within the local area. Local multiplier should be tailored to locality and industry.
target_requirements: Breakdown of spend with local supply chain. Name each supplier, category/industry, first three digits of postcode.
evidence_required: GBP spent, name, company size (micro/small/medium), industry, first three digits of postcode, distance from project.
unit_guidance: Total GBP spent with supply chain within defined local area.

title: No. of employees provided access to comprehensive wellbeing programmes (12+ months)
definition: Direct or supply chain employees on contract with access to comprehensive wellbeing programmes covering: flexible working, healthy nutrition, physical health, health risk appraisal, health/wellbeing resources.
target_requirements: Strategy for wellbeing programme covering: flexible working, nutrition, physical health, health risk appraisal, resources (web portal, literature, seminars). Name partner organisations.
evidence_required: Description of wellbeing programme and number of people with access. Evidence of: flexible working arrangements, nutrition options, physical health programmes, health risk appraisals, wellbeing resources.
unit_guidance: Number of employees on contract with access to qualifying wellbeing programmes.

title: Equality, diversity and inclusion training for staff and supply chain
definition: EDI training for direct staff, Tier 1 supply chain and subcontractors. Record cumulative hours experienced by attendees. Supply chain training must be at no cost to them.
target_requirements: Strategy for EDI training. Workplan with staff hours, number of people (own org and supply chain). Training objectives and monitoring approach.
evidence_required: Breakdown of staff hours, number of people. Training objectives and monitoring. GDPR compliant. Partner organisation details.
unit_guidance: Hours = session length x number of attendees. E.g. 2-hour session x 8 people = 16 hours.

title: Initiatives to reduce the gender pay gap (describe and document)
definition: Initiatives to reduce gender pay gap. E.g. changes to recruitment/promotion, mentoring, flexibility, shared parental leave, training.
target_requirements: Describe initiatives and implementation plan. Include recruitment/promotion changes, mentoring, flexibility, parental leave, training. Breakdown of projected costs. Partner organisations.
evidence_required: List initiatives, aims, reach, impact assessment. Breakdown of GBP invested per initiative. Partner details.
unit_guidance: GBP invested including staff time (volunteering at GBP 16.93/hr, expert time at GBP 101/hr) and materials/equipment.

title: No. of FTE local employees on contract given pay raise to Real Living Wage or higher
definition: On renewed contract or TUPE. Current Real Living Wage: UK GBP 9.90/hr, London GBP 11.05/hr (Living Wage Foundation).
target_requirements: Estimated number of FTE being renewed with wage increase to Real Living Wage. Specify UK or London rate thresholds.
evidence_required: Total renewed/retained contracts with raised wage to Real Living Wage. Previous and new salary figures. UK or London rate applied. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: Number of renewed/retained employment contracts raised to Real Living Wage or higher.

title: Initiatives to identify, monitor and reduce modern slavery risks in supply chain
definition: Initiatives to strengthen identification, monitoring and reduction of modern slavery risks. Includes supply chain mapping, staff training, recruitment checks, engagement programmes.
target_requirements: Identify and describe planned initiatives. Breakdown of expected costs per initiative.
evidence_required: Describe delivered initiatives, breakdown of costs. Number of supply chain organisations involved.
unit_guidance: GBP invested including staff time (volunteering at GBP 16.93/hr, expert time at GBP 101/hr) and materials/equipment.

title: Donations and/or in-kind contributions to local community projects (GBP & materials)
definition: Direct contributions to community projects. Cash or in-kind (e.g. donating a van). Excludes general charity donations, staff donations (unless matched), contributions not linked to contract.
target_requirements: Breakdown of GBP value of donations/in-kind to local community projects. Describe projects. Partner organisations.
evidence_required: Breakdown of GBP value donated. Describe projects supported. Partner details. Impact assessments if available. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: GBP donated (or equivalent value).

title: No. of hours volunteering time to support local community projects
definition: Formal volunteering hours during working time or paid overtime. Includes time organising activities. Not for family/friends. Must be allocated staff time.
target_requirements: Describe volunteering activities and community projects. Partner organisations. Breakdown of hours. E.g. 10 staff x 3 hours = 30 hours. Only work hours/overtime count.
evidence_required: Describe activities delivered and projects supported. Partner details. Breakdown of hours. GDPR compliant.
unit_guidance: E.g. 10 staff x 3 hours = 30 total hours.

title: Savings in CO2e emissions through de-carbonisation against benchmark
definition: CO2e savings from deliberate decarbonisation. Requires baseline emissions level and year, target emissions, and net zero policy. Must be independently verified (e.g. Planet Mark).
target_requirements: Describe initiatives for CO2 savings. Specify baseline emissions, baseline year, target emissions after reductions. Specify net zero policy (e.g. net zero by 2050). Timeframes.
evidence_required: Independent verification (e.g. Planet Mark). Baseline level and year, total emissions after reductions, net zero policy.
unit_guidance: Reductions in tCO2e against baseline. Must provide: baseline emissions, baseline year, total emissions after reductions, net zero policy.

title: CO2e reductions through reduced energy use and energy efficiency - on site
definition: On-site energy efficiency measures. E.g. LED lighting, hybrid generators. Requires baseline, target, and net zero policy. Standard kWh conversion factors.
target_requirements: Specify baseline emissions and year, target after reductions. Net zero policy. On-site energy measures only. Describe specific initiatives.
evidence_required: Baseline level and year, total emissions after reductions. Metering data or Energy Manager statement.
unit_guidance: Reductions in tCO2e against baseline for on-site energy use.

title: CO2e savings from car miles saved (cycling, carpooling)
definition: Transport-related CO2e savings from reduced car travel by employees. E.g. cycling to work schemes, carpooling initiatives.
target_requirements: Describe transport initiatives (cycling, carpooling). Specify baseline travel patterns and expected reductions.
evidence_required: Evidence of travel reductions. Baseline and actual travel data.
unit_guidance: tCO2e saved from reduced car travel.

title: CO2e savings from using low emission vehicles
definition: CO2e savings from fleet switching to low/zero emission vehicles.
target_requirements: Describe fleet plans and expected emissions reductions. Baseline and target.
evidence_required: Fleet data, baseline and actual emissions.
unit_guidance: tCO2e saved from low emission vehicle use.

title: Waste diverted from landfill (reused or recycled)
definition: Tonnes of waste that would otherwise go to landfill, diverted through reuse or recycling on the contract.
target_requirements: Waste management strategy. Targets for diversion from landfill. Breakdown by waste stream.
evidence_required: Waste transfer notes. Breakdown of tonnes by waste stream and destination (reuse/recycling).
unit_guidance: Tonnes of waste diverted from landfill.

title: Single-use plastics eliminated or reduced
definition: Kg of single-use plastics eliminated from operations on the contract.
target_requirements: Strategy for eliminating single-use plastics. Alternatives to be used.
evidence_required: Baseline plastic use and reductions achieved. Evidence of alternative materials.
unit_guidance: Kg of single-use plastics eliminated.

title: Innovative measures to promote local skills and employment to be delivered
definition: Innovative initiatives beyond standard TOMs measures that promote local skills and employment. Must demonstrate genuine innovation and additionality.
target_requirements: Describe innovative initiatives, how they go beyond standard practice, expected outcomes, and breakdown of investment.
evidence_required: Description of initiatives delivered, outcomes achieved, breakdown of investment, and evidence of innovation/additionality.
unit_guidance: GBP invested including staff time and resources.
